title: GeoboundaryCountrySubdivision
description: Represents the response from the geoboundary endpoint.

name.description:
Name of the country subdivision.
Example: California

iso_a2.description:
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.
Example: US

iso_3166_2.description:
ISO 3166-2 country subdivision code.
Example: US-CA (for California)

name_alt.description:
Alternative name of the country subdivision.
Example: CA|Calif.|Cal.

region.description:
Name of the region.
Example: West
